permissions.camera: Records the selected local camera source.
permissions.microphone: Records selected microphone audio and may support local transcription-based file naming.
permissions.screenAndSystemAudioRecording: Records selected screen and system audio sources.
permissions.localNetworkBonjour: Discovers and pairs with BlitzRecorder Camera on iPhone or iPad.
permissions.userSelectedFileAccess: Saves recordings and exports in the output folder the user chooses.

permissions.camera: Captures the iPhone/iPad camera source selected by the user.
permissions.localNetworkBonjour: Pairs with the Mac, sends monitor preview and camera telemetry, receives camera controls, and transfers local camera recordings.
permissions.microphone: Can include iPhone microphone audio in the source camera file when recording starts.
